title: Better Ships
description: This mod modify the Nodule controls from Cosmic Horizons mod to give you full movement and also implements Joystick support to the ship.
body:
**This mod is an add-on for Cosmic Horizons, you need to install Cosmic Horizons to get it working**

This mod aims to improve the controls from the spaceship from the mod Cosmic Horizons to let you move in any axis and also adds joystick and gamepad support for those controls
